description: Generate images with Google Nano Banana 2 (Gemini-family flash-tier text-to-image) on RunComfy — bundled with the model's documented prompting patterns so the skill gets sharper output than naive prompting against the same model. Documents Nano Banana 2's strengths (rapid iteration, in-image typography rendering, predictable framing, optional web-grounded context), the resolution-tier pricing, the safety-tolerance dial, and when to route to Nano Banana Pro / GPT Image 2 / Flux 2 / Seedream instead. Calls `runcomfy run google/nano-banana-2/text-to-image` through the local RunComfy CLI. Triggers on "nano banana", "nano-banana-2", "nano banana 2", "google image gen", "gemini image", or any explicit ask to generate with this model.
representativeQueries: Generate an image with Nano Banana 2
Create a social media thumbnail with text
Make a quick draft image using Gemini
Create web-grounded images for current events
